name: Pico De Gallo (Dupree)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the tomatoes, red onion, green onion, carrot (if using), olives (if using), jalapeno peppers, garlic, parsley, cilantro, lime juice, lime peel, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Let sit for 2 hours before serving to allow the flavors to marry.
